characters.name: JUSS
characters.description: Väike pruun karupoeg, pehme karvaga. Tal on seljas kollane T-särk ja sinised traksipüksid. Suured uudishimulikud silmad ja sõbralik naeratav nägu. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: TIINA
characters.description: Väike oranž rebasekutsikas, koheva sabaga. Tal on seljas roheline kleit ja peas väike punane pael. Säravad silmad ja mänguline näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: AIAS
locations.description: Sunny and vibrant garden. Lush green grass, a few colorful flowers (daisies, tulips) scattered around. In the background, there's a simple wooden fence and a large, leafy green tree. The sky is clear blue with soft white clouds. Gentle warm sunlight. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Juss, a small brown bear cub in a yellow T-shirt and blue overalls, and Tiina, a small orange fox cub in a green dress and red bow, are standing in a sunny garden. They are looking around with curious and happy expressions. Lush green grass, a few colorful flowers scattered around. A simple wooden fence and a large, leafy green tree in the background. Clear blue sky. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are still in the sunny garden, now both looking up at a small, friendly blue bird with a slightly worried expression, perched on a branch of the large leafy green tree. Juss points gently at the bird. Tiina looks thoughtful. Lush green grass, colorful flowers, wooden fence, clear blue sky remain. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, now looking at each other with bright, excited smiles. They have a new idea. Juss has a finger on his chin, thinking. Tiina claps her paws together gently. The little blue bird is still visible on the tree branch in the background, looking hopeful. Lush green grass, colorful flowers, wooden fence, clear blue sky remain. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, kneeling on the green grass. Juss is carefully picking up small, clean wooden blocks or pieces from a neat pile on the ground. Tiina is holding a small, empty wicker basket, ready to collect them. The garden environment is consistent. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, at a small, child-sized wooden table. Juss is holding a small paintbrush and carefully painting one of the wooden blocks green. Tiina is watching him, holding another wooden block, ready to be painted. A small pot of green paint is on the table. The garden environment is consistent. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, at the same small wooden table. They are carefully assembling the painted wooden blocks into the shape of a small birdhouse. Juss holds one piece steady while Tiina gently places another on top. There are simple tools like a small toy hammer or glue stick on the table. The birdhouse is starting to take shape. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, at the same small wooden table. The birdhouse is now fully assembled and they are decorating it. Tiina is carefully sticking a tiny, colorful paper flower onto the side of the birdhouse. Juss is holding a small, friendly-looking ladybug sticker, ready to place it on the roof. The garden environment is consistent. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are in the sunny garden, proudly standing next to the newly finished and decorated birdhouse. It is a cute, green wooden birdhouse with colorful little decorations. They are both smiling brightly and looking at their creation. The birdhouse is now placed on a small stand or a low branch, ready. The little blue bird from earlier is visible in the background, peeking from behind a leaf, looking interested. Cartoon style.

In the sunny garden, the little blue bird is happily flying directly into the entrance hole of the new green birdhouse. Juss and Tiina are standing a little distance away, watching with big, joyful smiles and silent cheers. The birdhouse is clearly visible on its stand/branch. Cartoon style.

Juss and Tiina are standing in the sunny garden, looking at the birdhouse with immense happiness. The little blue bird's head is peeking out from the birdhouse entrance, chirping happily. Juss and Tiina are giving each other a friendly high-five or a happy gesture. The garden scene is peaceful and joyful. Cartoon style.
